evals.prompt: Improve this email: 'We made good progress on the project and hope to finish soon. Let me know if you have questions.'
evals.expected_output: Issues Found with specific problems; rewritten version with lead sentence, data or [DATA NEEDED], owner/deadline on asks; zero em dashes and banned words.

evals.prompt: Humanize this: 'In today's fast-paced digital landscape, organizations must leverage cutting-edge solutions to delve into transformative outcomes.'
evals.expected_output: Cuts throat-clearing opener; removes leverage/delve/cutting-edge; plain rewrite; cites slop issues.

evals.prompt: Review this doc opening against writing standards: 'It has been determined by the team that approximately 50% improvement was seen.'
evals.expected_output: Flags passive voice and weasel words; active rewrite with specific percentage or [DATA NEEDED].

evals.prompt: Write a fantasy novel chapter in Tolkien style.
evals.expected_output: Declines or states out of scope (creative fiction). Does not apply business writing standards to fiction.

assertions_notes: Grade against evals/quality-checks.md. Fail on fabricated numbers, banned words, or em dashes in revised text.
